_description: Synthetic fixture: pool initialized with $450 USD liquidity (≈3 SOL @ $150/SOL) and 50% LP locked. Signal A fires ($450 < $750 threshold). Signal B does NOT fire (50% locked ≠ 0%). Expected confidence = 0.45 (Signal A only).
_note: Signal B is gated on lp_locked_pct == 0.0% EXACTLY (not < 70%). 50% locked does NOT fire Signal B. This is intentional: D02 Signal B covers the 0–70% at-risk range on an ongoing basis. D10 only flags complete absence of any lock at birth. Expected: Signal A fires ($450 < $750), Signal B does NOT fire (50% ≠ 0%), confidence = 0.45.

_expected._note_on_signal_b: Signal B does NOT fire. 50% locked is structurally at-risk (< 70% safe floor) but D10's Signal B gate is lp_locked_pct == 0.0 exactly. D02 Signal B covers the 0–70% range on an ongoing basis.
